title: Elemental's Farm!
description: Elemental's Farm is a resource pack that includes: veggies!(If you're vegan this would be a win! win! for you). But there's only one veggie here (pumpkineer). More will be coming soon!....
body:
Elemental's Farm is a resource pack that includes: veggies!(If you're vegan this would be a win! win! for you). But there's only one veggie here (pumpkineer). More will be coming soon!....

In-pack:

Pumpkineer-the pumpkin fakemon!,this fakemon disguises as a "pumpkin" to throw off its predators
and it has a smell that only human-beings can smell, but its predators can't smell them.
